jsonLd.title: NHB is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at NHB are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NHB:
NHB is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB!
